Our Services

Professional tree service solutions for every need

Tree Trimming & Pruning

Enhance the health, beauty, and safety of your trees with expert trimming.

Learn More →

Tree Removal

Safe and efficient tree removal services when necessary.

Learn More →

Stump Grinding & Removal

Remove unsightly tree stumps and reclaim your yard.

Learn More →

24/7 Emergency Tree Service

Rapid response for storm damage and hazardous tree situations.

Learn More →

Tree Risk Assessments

Comprehensive evaluations to identify and mitigate potential tree hazards.

Learn More →

Arborist Consultations

Expert advice on tree care, planting, and preservation.

Learn More →
Tree Masters, Inc.

Trusted tree service professionals serving Portland, OR and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
